title: Otsu Multi-level Segmentation
description: Segment a volume into N intensity bins via Otsu's multi-thresholding. Emits a labelmap and a JSON sidecar of per-label names + RGB colors. Backed by SimpleITK.

parameters.title: Input Volume
parameters.help: Input volume (DICOM, NIfTI, NRRD, MHA, etc.)

parameters.title: Number of levels
parameters.help: How many foreground labels to produce. Otsu picks N thresholds; you get N+1 bins (including background).

outputs.title: Output Labels (JSON)
outputs.help: Sidecar JSON: per-label name + RGB color.
